title: Emu/Tern Charge Case battery status
scenario: Charge case battery status display in Poly Studio Mobile app shows green with correct percentage when case is open with earbuds inside, and greys out with last known level when case is closed or earbuds are removed on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the app is on the Home screen showing connected devices.
3. With both earbuds inside the Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20 charge case, open the charge case lid.
4. Observe the battery status display on the Home screen for the connected device.
5. Remove one earbud from the charge case.
6. Observe the charge case battery status display on the Home screen.
7. Remove the second earbud from the charge case.
8. Observe the charge case battery status display on the Home screen.
9. Place both earbuds back into the charge case and close the lid.
10. Observe the charge case battery status display on the Home screen.
11. Open the charge case lid again with both earbuds inside.
12. Observe the charge case battery status display on the Home screen.
expected: When the charge case is opened with both earbuds inside, the charge case battery level is shown in green with the correct percentage, below the earbuds' battery levels and centered in the status box. When one or both earbuds are removed from the case, or when the case is closed (with or without earbuds inside), the charge case battery icon is greyed out and displays the last known battery level.
